mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, u.name, u.nickname, u.profile_image AS profileImg, t.description, t.trainer_type AS trainerType, t.address, t.is_verified AS isVerified, t.approval_status AS approvalStatus, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ts.type ORDER BY ts.type SEPARATOR ', ') AS specialty, MIN(CASE WHEN tp.is_active = 1 THEN tp.price END) AS minPrice FROM trainer t JOIN `user` u ON t.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN trainer_specialization ts ON ts.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN trainer_pricing tp ON tp.trainer_id = t.id
AND (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trainer_specialization ts2 WHERE ts2.trainer_id = t.id AND ts2.type = #{category} )
GROUP BY t.id, u.name, u.nickname, u.profile_image, t.description, t.trainer_type, t.address, t.is_verified, t.approval_status
ORDER BY minPrice ASC ORDER BY t.id DESC
